body:
This PR introduces the initial frontend asset structure for the project.

Changes:
- Created a standardized asset directory under public/assets
- Added cards structure (fire / water / nature)
- Added base folders for icons, images, logos, and effects
- Included .gitkeep files to preserve empty directories

Purpose:
- Establish a scalable and organized asset system
- Prepare for upcoming UI implementation and landing page development
- Ensure consistency for future design and animation assets

本次 PR 建立了前端资源（assets）的基础目录结构。
主要内容：
- 在 public/assets 下创建统一的资源目录
- 新增卡牌分类结构（fire / water / nature）
- 建立 icons、images、logos、effects 等基础文件夹
- 使用 .gitkeep 保留空目录结构
目的：
- 为后续 UI 开发提供清晰、可扩展的资源管理方式
- 支持 Landing Page 和动画效果实现
- 保证项目资源结构统一规范

comments.body: Closing this PR because the asset structure is not used and has been replaced by PR #60.

title: Feat/assets setup
